markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on the new website launch, Q1 content strategy, and article refresh plan.](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Website Launch:** The new site launches in \~2 weeks. GrowthX needs credentials for the new platform to continue publishing content.](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [**Q1 Content Focus:** The "Workforce Empowerment" cluster will be built around a "Digital Transformation" pillar article, with a new focus on "Coordinated Decision-Making" to address organizational silos.](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [**Article Refresh:** \~30 articles will be refreshed in Q1 to reverse declining traffic (e.g., clicks fell from 81 to 51 on one piece) or fix underperforming content (e.g., "AI for Industries" got only 1 click).](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [**New Content Format:** A new format will integrate "TLDR" summary blocks directly into articles to answer user questions immediately, boosting SEO and user engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)

## Topics

### New Website Launch

  - [**Timeline:** Launching in \~2 weeks; QA starts next week.](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The current WordPress site is critically unstable, breaking pages just by opening them in the editor.](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX needs credentials for the new platform to maintain publishing continuity.](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [**Blog Template:** The new template is \~60% complete and will include a "Related Articles" block with industry and category tagging.](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [**Content Migration:** Tara will confirm with the dev team that all content published since the initial port is included. Matt will provide a list of relevant URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)

### Q1 Content Strategy: Workforce Empowerment

  - [**Focus:** Build out the "Workforce Empowerment" content cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [**Pillar Content:** "Digital Transformation in Manufacturing" will serve as the central hub article.](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [**Spoke Topics (Examples):**](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
      - [Why AI adoption fails](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
      - [Workforce transformation (defining it for manufacturing)](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
      - [AI in workforce management](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
      - [Knowledge loss / "silver tsunami"](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
      - [Human-AI collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
      - [Scaling AI across plants](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
  - [**New Strategic Angle:** "Coordinated Decision-Making."](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To address "decision silos" where functional groups (e.g., maintenance, operations) make choices without transparency into cross-functional impacts.](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
      - [**Goal:** Promote transparency to enable better organizational trade-offs, not to dictate decision authority.](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)

### Q1 Initiative: Article Refresh

  - [**Goal:** Refresh \~30 articles from early in the partnership to improve performance.](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [**Selection Criteria:**](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
      - [**Declining Traffic:** Articles with a proven formula but falling clicks (e.g., clicks dropped from 81 to 51 on one piece).](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
      - [**Underperformance:** Articles that failed to rank despite strong keywords (e.g., "AI for Industries" received only 1 click).](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)
  - [**Execution:**](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
      - [**Small Lift:** Update with fresh data, better internal links.](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
      - [**Large Lift:** Full rewrite, keyword realignment.](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)

### New Content Format: TLDR Blocks

  - [**Problem:** Standard articles can fail to answer immediate user questions, hurting SEO and engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
  - [**Solution:** Integrate "TLDR" (Too Long; Didn't Read) summary blocks directly into articles.](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
  - [**Mechanism:** A concise, accordion-style block at the top of an article that directly answers the user's search query.](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
  - [**Benefits:**](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
      - [**SEO:** Boosts visibility by providing direct answers for AI-powered search.](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)
      - [**Engagement:** Satisfies users with short attention spans while encouraging them to read the full article for detail.](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [**Precedent:** The Homebase website uses this format successfully.](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)
      - [Send the Homebase TLDR example link to Tara via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)
      - [Finalize the Workforce Empowerment cluster map and add topics to Airtable for next week's sync.](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [**Tara:**](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=1773.0)
      - [Confirm with the dev team that all content published since the initial port will be migrated.](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
      - [Discuss the TLDR block format with Tim.](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=1773.0)
      - [Notify Matt of any scheduling conflicts for next week's sync.](https://fathom.video/share/sRe4yBxyXjJ94kCxwPvoddugqg23Rqi-?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
